name: Seed Blessing
description: The town blesses the season's first seeds and shares planting tips on the village common.

minigame.name: Seed Scramble
minigame.description: Blessed seed pods are tucked across the common — snatch the glowing one before it settles.

relationship.line: You came to the blessing! Here — press your thumb to the seed bowl with me. The bluff will remember it.

name: Glowtide Night
description: A lantern-lit night market along the shore as the tide glows. Stalls stay open past midnight.

minigame.name: Lantern Launch
minigame.description: Light each tide-lantern the moment it drifts past, before the current pulls it under.

relationship.line: Quiet a second — watch the tide light up. I save this spot every Glowtide. Glad it's you standing here.

name: Harvest Fair
description: A harvest market with stalls, a cook-off, and shared meals down the market lane.

minigame.name: Harvest Cook-Off
minigame.description: Plate each harvest dish the instant it's ready — let one sit and the judges move on.

relationship.line: Saved you a plate from the cook-off — still warm. Sit, eat. The fair's better with company.

name: Frostlight Festival
description: Warm cider and lanterns against the longest nights of the year.
